articles.title: Solana ETFs Next in Line As ETH ETF Debut, Here’s How the Future Looks Like
articles.description: Franklin Templeton eyes the launch of the Solana ETF to augment its exposure to digital assets. The firm made this revelation at the launch of its second-spot cryptocurrency ETF, the Franklin Ethereum ETF (EZET). The Ethereum ETF, with an initial expense ratio of zero, is listed on the CBOE BZX exchange. Franklin Templeton Debuts Ethereum […]

articles.title: Franklin Templeton Endorses Solana Again, Praising Tech and Adoption
articles.description: Solana receives praise from Franklin Templeton’s DA team, emphasizing its high-throughput architecture and robust adoption.

articles.title: Solana’s Solend Rebrands to Save and Announces Plans to Launch Stablecoin
articles.description: Solend, now Save, said it wants to launch a native stablecoin, a liquid staking token, and a protocol for shorting memecoins.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA) Sees Decline in Holders Despite Chang Hard Fork Optimism
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) is gearing up for a major upgrade. articles.title: Kamala Harris’ no-show at Bitcoin Conference stirs crypto debate over Democrat’s crypto stance
articles.description: US Vice President and potential Democratic Party candidate Kamala Harris will not speak at the Bitcoin Conference 2024. David Bailey, CEO of Bitcoin Magazine, confirmed this, noting that it is not surprising given how the Biden administration has been treating the industry. articles.title: Charles Hoskinson Believes Cardano Is On The Way To Flipping Bitcoin
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano (ADA), has expressed his belief that Cardano could surpass Bitcoin to become the leading crypto.

articles.title: Franklin Templeton Endorses Solana, Sparks Solana ETF Speculations!
articles.description: The post Franklin Templeton Endorses Solana, Sparks Solana ETF Speculations! appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News Franklin Templeton has recently endorsed Solana sparking speculations about a potential spot Solana ETF. Just yesterday, Franklin Templeton’s Ethereum ETF debuted, attracting $13.2 million in initial inflows. Moreover, its Bitcoin ETF holds assets exceeding $450 million. articles.title: Top Investment Firm Launches Credit Fund on Solana Network
articles.description: TL;DR Launch of Libre on Solana: Libre, a Web3 protocol by WebN Group and Nomura’s Laser Digital, has launched on the Solana network. It bridges Real World Assets (RWAs) with public chains, facilitating fund issuance and distribution. articles.title: Franklin Templeton Eyes Solana for Future ETFs
articles.description: Franklin Templeton, a pioneer in launching spot Bitcoin ETFs in the U.S., is now expressing enthusiasm about the potential for other cryptocurrencies, like Solana, to support new ETF offerings.
